consistency.level_to_cr_scaling: Consistent. Scaling linearly increases CR by 1 for each spell slot level above 6th.
consistency.duration_and_control: Consistent. Standard concentration duration (up to 1 hour) for summoning spells, with a clear mechanic for loss of control upon broken concentration (becoming hostile, remaining for the full duration if not dismissed).

quality.description_clarity: High. The description clearly defines the summoned creature's CR limits, friendliness, obedience rules, and the consequences of losing concentration.
quality.mechanics_completeness: Complete. It covers summoning, duration, control, combat roles, and scaling, adhering to standard D&D 5e summoning spell conventions.

mechanics.summon_type: Fey creature or a fey spirit taking the form of a beast.
mechanics.cr_limit: CR 6 or lower at base level.
mechanics.scaling_mechanism: CR increases by 1 for each slot level above 6th (e.g., 7th level slot summons CR 7 or lower).
mechanics.control_loss_consequence: Uncontrolled creature becomes hostile and remains for the full duration (1 hour from initial summoning, unless dismissed, which an uncontrolled one cannot be).
mechanics.action_economy_notes: Summon acts on its own initiative. Issuing commands requires no action from the caster.

suggested_updates: None. The spell adheres well to established design principles for high-level summoning magic.
